task_completion.description: Build partition walls for the Kiln Room and define four specific room zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, new partition walls should enclose a space. There must be text labels indicating four defined rooms: 'Kiln Room', 'Throwing Area', 'Glaze Lab', and 'Retail Gallery'.

task_completion.description: Apply a distinct floor color or texture to the Retail Gallery.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, the floor area defined as the 'Retail Gallery' must have a visibly different color or texture compared to the rest of the studio.

task_completion.description: Equip the Kiln Room with at least two kilns (appliances/cabinets) and add at least two dimension lines for fire safety clearances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, the 'Kiln Room' must contain at least two appliance or cabinet objects. There must be at least two dimension lines (lines with measurement numbers) drawn between these objects and the surrounding walls.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Throwing Area with stools and small tables, and the Glaze Lab with large tables and sinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Using the furniture list pane or 2D/3D views, verify there are at least 6 stools and 6 small tables located in the 'Throwing Area', and at least 4 large tables and 2 sinks in the 'Glaze Lab'.

task_completion.description: Add at least eight shelving units or bookcases throughout the studio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Using the furniture list pane or 2D/3D views, count a total of at least 8 shelving units or bookcases placed anywhere within the studio layout.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Retail Gallery with display tables/counters and a plant, and save the layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Using the furniture list pane or 2D/3D views, verify there are at least 2 display tables or counters and 1 plant in the 'Retail Gallery'. The Sweet Home 3D window title should not show an unsaved state (e.g., no asterisk next to the filename), or a save dialog/action should be visible in the final steps.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Sweet Home 3D graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking on tools, dragging furniture from the catalog, drawing walls, and using dialog boxes within the Sweet Home 3D application, rather than using a terminal or script to modify the file.

integrity.description: Furniture and architectural elements must be genuinely placed in the 3D environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D view pane (usually the bottom half of the screen) should update to show the 3D models of the placed walls, floors, and furniture, corresponding to the 2D plan.

integrity.description: Dimension lines must be created using the dimension tool, not just text labels.
integrity.visual_evidence: Clearance dimensions in the Kiln Room should appear as standard Sweet Home 3D dimension lines (lines with arrows at the ends and a numerical distance value in the middle), not just floating text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying 'pottery_studio_starter.sh3d' in Sweet Home 3D. Total points: 100. Pass threshold: 70. Required features include furniture placement, wall creation, room definition, dimension annotation, and floor color modification. The agent must create walls for a 'Kiln Room', define 4 specific room zones ('Kiln Room', 'Throwing Area', 'Glaze Lab', 'Retail Gallery'), apply a distinct floor color to the 'Retail Gallery', place >=2 kilns (appliances/cabinets) with >=2 dimension lines for clearance, and furnish the spaces with >=6 stools, >=6 small tables, >=4 large tables, >=2 sinks, >=8 shelving units, >=2 display tables/counters, and >=1 plant.
